title: rubus tanakae var. yenosimanus
intro: Rubus tanakae var. yenosimanus, also known as Yenosiman Black Raspberry, is a rare and lesser-known variant of the Rubus tanakae plant, belonging to the rose family and native to Japan. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Yenosiman Black Raspberry is valued for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Yenosiman Black Raspberry can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and is often used in traditional Japanese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
